_comment: Running list of domains that block scraping (bot-walls, auth-walls, rate limits). Read BEFORE scraping to skip them proactively, and appended to automatically whenever a domain returns a hard-block failure (HTTP 401/403/429/451) during a scan. This is the app's only persistent state. Managed by src/lib/blocklist.ts — edit through there, or hand-edit `domains` (keep it sorted, lowercase, bare hostnames without www.). Entries note when/why a domain was added.

reddit.com.reason: seed: 403 bot-wall ("we do not support this site")
